version_description: You won't need a capo for this. Hopefully it is correct, feel free to correct me in the comments otherwise. Enjoy x.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]           [ch]C/E[/ch]
Damn, Callan (Damn, Callan)[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                                      [ch]C/E[/ch]

[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
One false move and we straight to shootin' shit[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                          [ch]D[/ch]
